name: DynaVap The VonG Starter Kit
summary: A complete battery-free DynaVap kit with torch and stash for patients starting out with manual vaping.
description: The VonG Starter Kit is everything a patient needs to begin battery-free vaping in one box — the VonG vaporiser, a single torch, a walnut DynaStash, wax, pipe cleaners and spare O-rings. The manual stainless steel tip heats in 5 to 10 seconds with the torch, clicks when ready, and runs a 0.1g chamber for microdosing or full extraction. The all-in-one kit removes the usual hurdle of buying a torch separately. It suits patients who want DynaVap's flavour and durability without sourcing the extras themselves. The torch needs refilling with butane, and there is a short learning curve to the click-cap technique.
